authors: Wei Zhong Bin Chen Fan Liang Maggie Mengqing Zhang
raw_title: Picturing Protest: Visual Framing in Authoritarian Media on Twitter
title_en: Picturing Protest: Visual Framing in Authoritarian Media on Twitter
title_zh: 描绘抗议：威权媒体在推特上的视觉框架
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了威权媒体如何在推特上使用图片来报道抗议活动，重点关注他们如何通过视觉元素塑造公众对事件的看法。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how authoritarian media use images on Twitter to cover protests, focusing on how they shape public perception of events through visual elements.
research_direction_zh: 探索数字时代中威权政权如何利用社交媒体平台进行视觉传播和框架设置，以影响国内外舆论。
research_direction_en: Exploring how authoritarian regimes utilize social media platforms for visual communication and framing in the digital age to influence domestic and international public opinion.
